zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine Cumberworth於大約1365年出生在英國林可爾史爾索莫比時，她的父親Robert Cumberworth35歲，母親Sibil Erghum27歲。她和Sir Marmaduke Constable II至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於大約1404年在英國享年41歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾索莫比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catherine Cumberworth于大约1365年出生在英国林可爾史爾索莫比时，她的父亲Robert Cumberworth35岁，母亲Sibil Erghum27岁。她和Sir Marmaduke Constable II至少有5个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于大约1404年在英国享年41岁，埋葬在英国林可爾史爾索莫比。

nameMeanings.name: Cumberworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): habitational name from Cumberworth in Lincolnshire, named from an Old English personal name Cumbre + worth ‘enclosure’. There is also a Lower and an Upper Cumberworth in Yorkshire but these appear not to have contributed significantly to the modern surname, which is concentrated in Lincolnshire.

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine Cumberworth was born about 1365, in Somerby, Lincolnshire, England, her father, Robert Cumberworth, was 35 and her mother, Sibil Erghum, was 27. She had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Sir Marmaduke Constable II. She died about 1404, in England, at the age of 41, and was buried in Somerby, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine Cumberworth est née environ 1365, à Somerby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Cumberworth, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Sibil Erghum, avait 27 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec Sir Marmaduke Constable II. Elle est décédée environ 1404, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterrée à Somerby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Catherine Cumberworth um 1365 in Somerby, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Cumberworth 35 und ihre Mutter Sibil Erghum 27. Sie hatte mit Sir Marmaduke Constable II mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1404 im Alter von 41 Jahren in England und wurde in Somerby, Lincolnshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Cumberworth è nata il circa 1365 nel Somerby, Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, Robert Cumberworth, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Sibil Erghum, aveva 27 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con Sir Marmaduke Constable II. Morì circa 1404, nel England, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolta a Somerby, Lincolnshire, England.

ja.Somerby, Lincolnshire, England: イギリスリンコルンシュアイアソメルビー

ja.lifeSummary: Catherine Cumberworthが約1365年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアソメルビーで生まれた時，父Robert Cumberworthは35歳，母Sibil Erghumは27歳であった。彼女はSir Marmaduke Constable IIとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1404年にイギリスで41歳で死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアソメルビーにて埋葬された。

ko.Flamborough, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 플램루

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine Cumberworth(이)가 대략 1365년 영국 링코실르 서머비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Cumberworth(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sibil Erghum(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 Sir Marmaduke Constable II(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1404년 영국에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 서머비에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Cumberworth nasceu aproximadamente 1365, em Somerby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Cumberworth, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Sibil Erghum, tinha 27 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha com Sir Marmaduke Constable II. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1404, em Inglaterra, com 41 anos, e foi sepultada em Somerby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine Cumberworth родилась около 1365 г. в местности сомирби, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Cumberworth было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Sibil Erghum, 27. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от Sir Marmaduke Constable II. Она умерла около 1404 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 41 год и была похоронена в местности сомирби, линколншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Catherine Cumberworth nació aproximadamente 1365, en Somerby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Cumberworth, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Sibil Erghum, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija con Sir Marmaduke Constable II. Murió aproximadamente 1404, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultada en Somerby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.
